content:
Your resume is clear and professional. The skills section is strong, but your work experience section could be improved by adding more detailed bullet points that show specific accomplishments or contributions in each role. Employers like to see results, so including measurable details will make your resume stand out even more. Additionally, check for consistent formatting in spacing and punctuation.

With a few small refinements, your materials will be even stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 80/100
• Resume: 85/100

⸻
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 22 (chunk 22/22)
